anti_patterns: Do not use before defining find

when_to_use: Stable app resource id/accessibility identifier/desktop automation id
anti_patterns: Avoid generated ids that change per build

when_to_use: Accessibility label/description/content-desc or desktop automation id
anti_patterns: Avoid localized text if id exists

when_to_use: Visible stable text or desktop accessible title/name/value
anti_patterns: Avoid non-exact text for short common words
Do not set exact when text is dynamic/localized
Avoid broad patterns like .*
Avoid brittle nth-child chains

when_to_use: Accessible role/control type when labels are duplicated
anti_patterns: Combine with text or index when role is duplicated

when_to_use: Input placeholder text or desktop help/description text
anti_patterns: Avoid if placeholder disappears on focus

when_to_use: Accessibility description/help text when id/text are absent
anti_patterns: Avoid broad descriptions that match many controls
Avoid absolute deep hierarchy paths
Avoid when screen layout changes often
Avoid as primary selector

when_to_use: Canvas/graphics/Android Auto or no semantic selector
anti_patterns: Do not start with coordinates for normal app UI
Avoid screenshots that vary by theme/scale
Do not over-constrain before verifying screen size

when_to_use: Text visible in screenshot but absent from hierarchy
anti_patterns: Avoid when native text/id exists

when_to_use: Repeated list/card rows near stable anchor
anti_patterns: Avoid if anchor is not unique
Avoid if scrollUntilVisible can find semantic target
Avoid overly broad parent type
Do not use to hide real failures
Not a selector
